heroHeadline: BREAKING — Projectile Strikes Near Bushehr Nuclear Plant, 1 Killed; US Pilot Rescued After Jet Downed
heroSubtitle: The IAEA confirmed a projectile struck near Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant on April 4, killing one person — the reactor was not directly hit. Separately, one US fighter jet pilot has been rescued after being downed in the Iran theater. The April 6 Hormuz deadline is less than 48 hours away.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
